profile.title: My Profile
profile.notLoggedIn: Please log in to view your profile.

hero.title: Where Little Hands Shape the Future of Fashion
hero.subtitle: Every child's imagination, woven into sustainable threads. Every purchase, a step toward a fairer world.

cta.title: Join the Movement
cta.description: Whether you donate, shop, or share our story — every action counts.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: A publication born from the belief that every child deserves to see their creativity change the world.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Tonghua Public Welfare bridges the raw, unfiltered imagination of children with the world of sustainable fashion. We believe that the most honest art comes from the youngest hands — and that fashion can be a force for good when it carries those stories forward.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.body: Every thread traced. Every donation accounted for. We publish our supply chain because you deserve to know.

childFirst.title: Child-First Design
childFirst.body: Children are collaborators, not subjects. Their consent, privacy, and creative ownership are non-negotiable.

sustainability.title: Genuine Sustainability
sustainability.body: No greenwashing. We measure carbon footprints, use certified materials, and publish our environmental impact quarterly.

community.title: Community Roots
community.body: We work with local schools, shelters, and community centers. Fashion is the medium; community is the message.

team.title: The People Behind the Pages
team.subtitle: A small team with an oversized purpose.

hero.title: Campaigns
hero.subtitle: Each campaign is a chapter — a focused effort to connect children's art with sustainable fashion that funds real change.

listing.sectionSubtitle: Browse our ongoing, upcoming, and completed initiatives.

campaigns.empty: No campaigns found matching your criteria.

hero.title: Stories
hero.subtitle: Dispatches from the intersection of childhood, creativity, and conscious fashion.

newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.subtitle: Get monthly dispatches on campaigns, stories, and the impact your support creates.

stories.empty: No stories found in this category.

hero.title: Donate
hero.subtitle: Your generosity funds art supplies, workshops, sustainable materials, and the infrastructure that turns children's dreams into wearable stories.

seedling.label: Seedling
seedling.description: Provides basic art supplies for one child for a month.

bloom.label: Bloom
bloom.description: Funds a workshop session for a classroom of children.

canopy.label: Canopy
canopy.description: Supports the production of a sustainable garment from children's artwork.

forest.label: Forest
forest.description: Sponsors an entire campaign from artwork collection to product launch.

transparency.title: Financial Transparency
transparency.subtitle: We publish quarterly financial reports. Every yuan is accounted for.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Your donation directly funds art supplies, workshops, and sustainable materials for children. We publish quarterly reports showing exactly how every yuan is spent.
faq.a2: Yes, you can choose to make your donation anonymous. Your privacy is important to us, and we respect your choice.
faq.a3: Yes, all donations to Tonghua Public Welfare are tax-deductible. You will receive an official receipt for your records.
faq.q4: How can I track my donation impact?
faq.a4: You will receive updates on how your donation is making a difference. We also publish quarterly financial reports showing the impact of all donations.

hero.title: Shop
hero.subtitle: Every garment carries a child's story. Every purchase funds the next chapter.

shop.empty: No products found in this category.

hero.title: Traceability
hero.subtitle: From the child's hand that drew the design to the artisan who stitched it — follow every step of the journey.

hero.title: Contact
hero.subtitle: We read every message. Whether you have a question, a partnership idea, or a story to share — we're listening.
